indications.text:
COLAZAL® is indicated for the treatment of mildly to moderately active ulcerative colitis in patients 5 years of age and
older.
Limitations of Use
Safety and effectiveness of COLAZAL beyond 8 weeks in pediatric patients 5 years to 17 years of age and 12 weeks in
adults have not been established.

COLAZAL is indicated for the treatment of mildly to moderately active ulcerative
colitis in patients 5 years of age and older. Safety and effectiveness of COLAZAL
beyond 8 weeks in children (ages 5-17 years) and 12 weeks in adults have not been
established.
